name: noyona/store-locator-section
title: Store Locator Section
description: A responsive store locator CTA with copy and map image card.

heading.default: Experience Beauty, the Noyona Essentials Way.

description.default: Step into a Noyona Essentials boutique and experience the brand the way it was meant to be. Every product, every shade, all in one place.

supportingText.default: Looking for something closer? Find Noyona at a partner store near you — because great skin shouldn't be hard to find.
